disclaimer.zh: 本模組呈現 Dogon 口傳宇宙觀（含 Marcel Griaule 系列紀錄）作為文化知識，不等同現代天文學或歷史定論；部分內容存在學術爭議。
disclaimer.en: This module presents Dogon oral cosmology (including lore documented in the Marcel Griaule corpus) as cultural knowledge, not as settled modern scientific fact; some claims remain academically contested.

cultural.zh: 可見主星，與 Sigui 祭儀週期關聯。
cultural.en: Visible principal star linked to the Sigui ceremonial cycle.

cultural.zh: Po Tolo 在口傳中象徵高密度『種子』。
cultural.en: Po Tolo is a dense 'seed' symbol in oral tradition.

cultural.zh: Emme Ya 為傳說層次天體，用於文化象徵而非觀測定論。
cultural.en: Emme Ya is modeled as lore-level body for cultural symbolism, not observational certainty.

references: Griaule, Marcel & Dieterlen, Germaine (mid-20th c. ethnographic corpus)
van Beek, W. E. A. (critical reassessment)
Modern astronomy: Sirius A/B orbital period ~50 years

focus.zh: 索普德特（Sopdet）與天狼星歲首、尼羅河氾濫週期
固定星與王權預兆傳統
長週期曆法與儀式時間結構
focus.en: Long-cycle calendrics and ritual time structures
